name: Hendvar's Enchanting Tools
description: Portable enchanting station — a toolkit rather than a fixed station.
effect: A specialized set of enchanting tools used for crafting and identifying magical items. Provides proficiency on Arcana checks made to enchant or inspect magic items.

name: Oil of Sharpness
effect: For 1 hour: weapon gains +3 to attack and damage rolls. Piercing and slashing attacks score a critical hit on a 19 or 20.

name: Oil of Sharpness
effect: For 1 hour: weapon gains +3 to attack and damage rolls. Piercing and slashing attacks score a critical hit on a 19 or 20.

name: Oil of Sharpness
effect: For 1 hour: weapon gains +3 to attack and damage rolls. Piercing and slashing attacks score a critical hit on a 19 or 20.

name: Everlasting Blue Candles
description: Candles that do not burn down.
effect: Candles that never extinguish and cannot be blown out by wind or water. Each candle sheds dim light in a 5ft radius.

name: Boots of the Tireless North
description: Soft leather, northern make, clan stitching along the ankle. Worn looking but perfectly preserved. Sized for small feet.
effect: No movement penalties in difficult terrain (snow, ice, mud, rubble). Travel pace never causes exhaustion regardless of distance covered in a day.

name: Blackwood Wand Focus
description: Blackwood wand usable as a spellcasting focus.
effect: +1 to spell attack rolls and spell save DC.

name: Veilstrike Rapier +2
effect:
+2 to attack and damage rolls. Grants the wielder Sneak Attack: once per turn when you hit with this weapon and have advantage on the attack, or an ally is within 5ft of the target, deal extra damage. If you already have Sneak Attack, use the higher value.

Sneak Attack dice (half level, rounded down):
L1: — · L2–3: 1d6 · L4–5: 2d6 · L6–7: 3d6 · L8–9: 4d6 · L10–11: 5d6 · L12–13: 6d6 · L14–15: 7d6 · L16–17: 8d6 · L18–19: 9d6 · L20: 10d6

name: Echo Dagger +2
notes: Off-hand secondary weapon.
effect: +2 to attack and damage rolls. Once per turn when you hit with this dagger, you may use your reaction to make one off-hand attack.

name: Warden Dagger
notes: Boot dagger backup. Reliable against extraplanar threats.
effect: Deals +2 damage on a hit against fiends, aberrations, undead, and monstrosities.

name: Hand Crossbow +2 (Rooting)
effect: Once per turn on a hit: choose to deal damage as normal OR root target in place until end of their next turn.
notes: Sidearm.

name: Hand Crossbow (standard)
notes: Backup ranged.
effect: Standard hand crossbow. 1d6 piercing. Range 30/120ft. Light, loading.

name: Wyvern Scale Coat +2
effect: +2 bonus to AC from armor.

name: Bracer of Swift Strikes
notes: Free off-hand attack reaction.
effect: Once per turn when you hit with a melee attack, you may make one off-hand attack as a reaction.

name: Amulet of Proof against Detection
effect: Immune to divination magic. Cannot be targeted by magic that detects emotions, thoughts, or location, or perceived through magical scrying sensors.

name: Helm of Comprehending Languages
effect: Cast Comprehend Languages at will while worn.

name: Boots of Speed
effect: Double movement speed as bonus action. Opportunity attacks have disadvantage while active.

name: Hat of Disguise
notes: Carried conditionally.
effect: Cast Disguise Self at will while worn.

name: Vest of Resistance (Cold)
effect: Resistance to cold damage.

name: Green Cloak of Presence
effect: Advantage on Persuasion and Performance checks. Once per day: hold a room.

name: Ioun Stone of Mastery
effect: Proficiency bonus increases by 1 while attuned.

name: Cloak of Unremarkability
effect: Wearer becomes visually uncompelling — the eye slides past without focusing.

name: Wand of Secrets
effect: Detects secret doors and traps within 30ft.

name: Coin of Truth
effect: Ask yes/no questions. Always truthful.

name: Eight Unknown Coins
notes: Large gold coins, unfamiliar crest. Not Fynesmarch minting.
effect: Eight large gold coins bearing an unfamiliar crest. Not Fynesmarch minting. Origin unknown.

name: Bracers of Defense
effect: +2 bonus to AC when not wearing armor or using a shield.

name: Ring of Protection +1
effect: +1 bonus to AC and saving throws.

name: Cloak of Displacement
effect: Attacks against you have disadvantage on the first attack roll each turn. Ends if you are incapacitated until the start of your next turn.

name: Ring of Free Action
effect: Unaffected by difficult terrain, movement speed reduction, and paralysis.

name: Belt of Giant Strength
effect: Sets STR to 27.

name: Vest of Resistance (Cold)
effect: Resistance to cold damage.

name: Greatsword +3
effect: On a critical hit: target makes a STR saving throw or is knocked prone.

name: Ceremonial Horn
effect: Functions as both drinking vessel and musical instrument.
notes: Pre-clan-separation northern craftsmanship.

name: Boots of the Winterlands
effect: Resistance to cold damage. Move across icy surfaces without penalty. Withstand extreme cold.

name: Dagger of Swift Strike +1
effect: Once per turn on a hit: immediately make a second strike with this dagger as part of the same attack, without using a bonus action.

name: Leather Armor +2
effect: +2 bonus to AC from armor.

name: Boots of Elvenkind
effect: Your steps make no sound regardless of surface. Advantage on Stealth checks that rely on moving silently.

name: Gloves of Thievery
effect: Invisible while worn. +5 bonus to Sleight of Hand checks and checks to pick locks.

name: Ring of Watchful Eye
effect: +1 bonus to Perception checks while worn.

name: Ring of Stilled Breath
effect: The wearer's breathing is completely silent. Advantage on Stealth checks in situations where breathing could give away your position. Creatures relying on hearing alone cannot detect you by your breath.

name: Cloak of Arachnida
effect: Spider climb. Immunity to web. Cast Web 1/day.

name: Cold Dagger +2
effect: Deals cold damage. On hit: +1d6 cold damage and target's movement reduced by 10ft until start of their next turn.

name: Gloves of Missile Snaring
effect: Reaction when hit by ranged attack: reduce damage by 1d10 + DEX. If reduced to 0, catch the missile.

name: Alchemical Dagger
notes: Passive alchemical utility. Results vary by what you dip it in.
effect: When dipped into any liquid, identifies its properties (potion, poison, magical substance, etc.) within 1 round. After identification, the blade retains a coating of that liquid — the next attack with this dagger delivers the substance to the target. Effect could be beneficial or harmful depending on the liquid.

name: Alchemical Heavy Crossbow
effect: Fires custom alchemical bolts. Quieter release.
notes: Proficiency resolution still needed.

name: Alchemical Heavy Crossbow (party copy)
effect: Fires custom alchemical bolts. Quieter release.
notes: Second copy.

name: Web Bomb
effect: When thrown, a web fills a 20ft radius at the target point for 1 minute. Creatures must succeed on a STR save or be restrained.

name: Smoke Bomb
effect: When thrown, creates a 20ft radius sphere of smoke for 1 minute. The area is heavily obscured.

name: Flash Bomb
effect: When thrown, creatures within 10ft must succeed on a CON saving throw (DC 13) or be blinded until end of their next turn.

name: Clockwork Distraction Device
effect: When activated, produces a mechanical noise at a chosen point up to 30ft away for up to 1 minute. Useful for drawing attention or masking other sounds.

name: Magnetic Lock Disruptor
effect: When held against a magnetically sealed or mechanically locked mechanism, disrupts the lock. Advantage on checks to pick or force magnetic and clockwork locks.

name: Magical Aura Detector
notes: 30ft range.
effect: Continuously detects magical auras within 30ft while held. Reveals the presence of magic but not its school or strength without closer examination.

name: Amulet of Health
effect: Your Constitution score is 19 while you wear this amulet. Has no effect if your CON is already 19 or higher.

name: Cloak of Displacement
notes: Second copy confirmed intentional.
effect: Attacks against you have disadvantage on the first attack roll each turn. Ends if you are incapacitated until the start of your next turn.

name: Leather Armor +2
effect: +2 bonus to AC from armor.

name: Shield of Retribution
effect: When bearer is hit by melee attack, attacker takes 1d6 force damage.

name: Bracer of Steady Aim
effect: +1 ranged attack. Advantage on concentration saves after taking damage.

name: Wand of Wonder
effect: Cast random magical effect using charges.

name: Ring of Feather Falling
effect: When you fall, you descend 60 feet per round and take no damage from falling.

name: Pearl of Power
effect: Once per long rest: expend an action to regain one expended spell slot of 3rd level or lower.

name: Silvered Shortsword
notes: Backup weapon. Silvered.
effect: Silvered. Bypasses damage immunity and resistance for creatures such as lycanthropes and certain undead.

name: Gloves of Spellcasting
effect: Every spell cast treated as one level higher automatically.

name: Travelling Flute
effect: Lenn's personal flute. Functions as a Bardic focus. No additional magical properties.

name: Elemental Resistance Robes
effect: Resistance to one element chosen on attunement. Attuned to: fire.

name: Staff of Evocation
effect: Evocation spells have no effect on allies.

name: Rapier +2 (Psychic)
effect: On a hit: choose to deal psychic damage instead of piercing.

name: Bracers of Defense
effect: +2 bonus to AC when not wearing armor or using a shield.

name: Concentration Robes
effect: Advantage on concentration checks.

name: Ring of Impact
effect: Stops a harsh impact once per day.

name: The Lexicon
effect: Spell save DC +2. Once per long rest when casting 3rd level or higher: cast as if one level higher without expending the higher slot.

name: Robe of the Archmagi
effect: +2 spell DC and attack, advantage on saves against spells, AC 15 unarmored.

name: Cloak of Protection +2
effect: +2 AC and saving throws.

name: Half Plate +1
effect: +1 bonus to AC from armor.

name: Waive
effect: Whenever bearer casts a healing spell, all other creatures within 15ft are healed for 2hp.

name: Shield of Expression
effect: Display any image or symbol on shield face.
notes: Cosmetic.

name: Amulet of the Devout +2
effect: +2 spell attack and spell save DC.

name: Medallion of Concentration
effect: Advantage on all concentration checks.

name: Silvered Shortsword
notes: Backup. Silvered.
effect: Silvered. Bypasses damage immunity and resistance for creatures such as lycanthropes and certain undead.

name: Studded Leather +1
effect: +1 bonus to AC from armor.

name: Gloves of Thievery
effect: Invisible while worn. +5 Sleight of Hand and lockpicking.

name: Cloak of the Manta Ray
effect: Breathe underwater. Swim speed 60.

name: Longsword +2
notes: Party backup.
effect: +2 bonus to attack and damage rolls.

name: Sword of Sharpness
effect: On a roll of 20: severs a limb and deals extra 14 damage.

name: Gloves of Dueling
effect: +2 bonus to damage rolls when fighting with a melee weapon in one hand and nothing in the other.

name: Cloak of Protection +2
effect: +2 AC and saving throws.

name: Mithral Half Plate +2
effect: No stealth disadvantage.

name: The Farreach (A)
effect: Advantage on first attack each round when within 30ft of paired ring. +1d6 force damage. Once per day: responsive bonus to ability or skill check.

name: Longbow +2 (Force)
effect: Deals force damage instead of piercing.

name: Bow Grip
effect: Reduces moving shot penalty.

name: Studded Leather Armor +2
effect: +2 bonus to AC from armor.

name: Boots of Elvenkind
effect: Your steps make no sound regardless of surface. Advantage on Stealth checks that rely on moving silently.

name: Bracers of Archery
effect: Proficiency with longbows and shortbows. +2 bonus to damage rolls with ranged weapons.

name: The Farreach (B)
effect: Advantage on first attack each round when within 30ft of paired ring. +1d6 force damage. Once per day: responsive bonus.

name: Hand Crossbow +1
notes: Sidearm.
effect: +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls.

name: Rapier
notes: Backup melee.
effect: Standard rapier. Finesse weapon. 1d8 piercing damage.

name: Leather Armor +2
effect: +2 bonus to AC from armor.

name: Hat of Perception
effect: +1 passive perception. Advantage on Perception in dim light or darkness.

name: Cloak of Elvenkind
effect: Advantage on Stealth checks outdoors. Color shifting.

name: Rope of Climbing and Entanglement
effect: 60ft rope, animates on command. Restrain target 1/day.

name: Cloak of Protection
effect: +1 bonus to AC and saving throws.

name: Bracers of Defense
effect: +2 bonus to AC when not wearing armor or using a shield.

name: Belt of Constitution
effect: Sets CON to 18.

name: Robe of Stars
effect: Cast Magic Missile at 5th level using charges. +1 saving throws. Planewalk to Astral Plane.

name: Staff of Power
effect: Cast from charges: Magic Missile, Ray of Enfeeblement, Fireball, Lightning Bolt, Cone of Cold, Hold Monster, Wall of Force, Globe of Invulnerability. +2 spell attack and DC.
notes: Do not break it.

name: Circlet of Scorching Ray 3
effect: Cast Scorching Ray 3 times per day.

name: Plate +2
effect: +2 bonus to AC from armor.

name: Halberd of Warning
effect: Cannot be surprised, advantage on initiative. Wakes wielder if danger approaches during sleep.

name: Longsword +2 (Bronze Flame)
effect: Command word ignites bronze edges — adds 2d6 fire damage to each hit while active.

name: Collapsible Shield +2
effect: +2 bonus to AC from this shield. Can be collapsed for storage.

name: Gauntlets of Ogre Power
effect: Sets STR to 19.

name: Cloak of Protection +1
effect: +1 AC and saving throws.

name: Circlet of Mental Fortress
effect: Advantage on INT, WIS, CHA saving throws. Resistance to psychic damage.

name: Amulet of Health
effect: Sets CON to 19.

name: Bone Ring of Weapon Retention
effect: Cannot be disarmed.

name: Bracers of Defense +2
effect: +2 AC when not wearing armor or shield.

name: Elemental Resistance Robes
effect: Resistance to one element. Attuned to: fire.

name: Ring of Transmutation
effect: 1 charge: Alter Self. 2 charges: Polymorph (self only). 3 charges: Gaseous Form.

name: Ring of Jumping
effect: Jump distance tripled.

name: The Weaver's Master-Awl
description: A simple ancient bone-handled leatherworking awl. The needle-point glows with a faint psionic violet hue.
effect: Four properties: (1) Psionic Reinforcement — Psychic Blades +2 attack and damage. (2) Tactical Foresight — Help targets two allies. (3) Grandmaster's Stitch — infuse leather item during long rest. (4) The Retired Special — once per day reaction pull ally up to 15ft.

name: Stormsplit
notes: Dual form is one weapon not two benefits.
effect: +2 to attack and damage rolls. A flail that can be held rigid by rubbing the handle, giving it the appearance and weight of a mace. Mechanically identical in either form.

name: Half Plate +2 (Lightning)
effect: Resistance to lightning and thunder damage.

name: Wand of Magic Missiles
effect: Cast Magic Missile using charges.

name: Hand Crossbow +2
notes: Sidearm.
effect: +2 bonus to attack and damage rolls.

name: Ring of Lightning Resistance
effect: Resistance to lightning damage while wearing this ring.

name: Leather Armor +1
effect: +1 bonus to AC from armor.

name: Returning Spear +2
effect: Returns to hand after thrown. On crit: target knocked prone regardless of size.

name: Curved Blade +2
effect: On a critical hit: deals 2d6 slashing damage instead of doubling dice.

name: Whisper Longbow +2
effect: +2 to attack and damage rolls. Arrows fired from this bow make no sound — twang, flight, and impact are completely silent. The shot’s origin cannot be determined by sound alone.

name: Bracers of Archery
effect: Proficiency with longbows and shortbows. +2 bonus to damage rolls with ranged weapons.

name: Leather Armor +2 (Southern)
effect: +2 bonus to AC from armor. Southern craftsmanship.

name: The Steadfast
effect: Reaction when ally within 30ft drops to 0hp: grant 1d8 + proficiency bonus temp HP. Advantage on death saving throws.

name: Greatsword +2
notes: Return to Corwin or party pool.
effect: +2 bonus to attack and damage rolls.

name: Belt of Giant Strength
effect: Sets STR to 21.

name: Cloak of Invisibility
effect: Become invisible for up to 1 hour per day.

name: Necklace of Prayer Beads
effect: Each bead cast once per day. Rolled spells: Bless, Greater Restoration, Cure Wounds, Wind Walk.

name: Helmet of Proof
effect: Immunity to charm and fear.

name: Amulet of Poison Immunity
effect: Complete immunity to poison while worn.

name: Full Plate +2 (Grey-Green)
effect: Resistance to lightning and thunder damage.

name: Maul +2
effect: On a critical hit: target is knocked prone.

name: Bracers of Swiftness
effect: +10ft movement speed. Dash as bonus action once per short rest.

name: Berserker's Fang +1
notes: Currently mounted at Revivify. Could be taken up again if needed.
effect: +1 to attack and damage rolls with this greataxe.

name: Ring of Spell Storing (5 levels)
effect: Holds up to 5 levels worth of spells. Any creature can cast a stored spell using the original caster spell save DC and spell attack bonus.
notes: Holds up to 5 levels worth of spells. Any creature can cast stored spell.

name: Ring of Spell Storing (3rd level)
effect: Holds one spell of up to 3rd level. Any creature attuned to the ring can cast the stored spell.
notes: Holds one spell up to 3rd level.

name: Bracers of Spell Storing
effect: Holds up to 5 levels worth of spells. The attuned creature can cast stored spells.
notes: Holds spells up to 5th level.

name: Carved Bone Totem
notes: Spellcasting focus. Thirty years old.
effect: Spellcasting focus. Can be used in place of material components with no GP cost. Thirty years old; carries a quiet attunement to its owner.

name: Hide Armor
notes: Worn and repaired many times.
effect: Standard hide armor. AC 12 + DEX modifier (max 2).

name: Simple Spear
notes: Hasn't used offensively in fifteen years.
effect: Standard spear. 1d6 piercing (1d8 versatile). Can be thrown 20/60ft.

name: Scroll of Thunderstorm
effect: Single use. Large area lightning damage.

name: Potion of Greater Healing
effect: Restores 4d4+4 HP.

name: Potion of Greater Healing
effect: Restores 4d4+4 HP.

name: Gemstones
effect: 6 spinel gems and 2 sapphires.

name: Tome of Clear Thought
effect: Reading takes 48 hours over 6 days. INT score and maximum increase by 2. Becomes mundane for 100 years afterward.
notes: Read on day 121.

name: Longsword +2 (party backup)
notes: Backup melee.
effect: +2 bonus to attack and damage rolls.

name: Boots of Speed
effect: Double movement speed as bonus action. Opportunity attacks have disadvantage while active.
notes: Unassigned.

name: Ring of Spell Turning
effect: Advantage on saves against spells targeting only you. On natural 20, spell reflected back at caster.
notes: Unassigned.

name: Belt of Dwarvenkind
effect: +2 CON. Advantage on CHA checks with dwarves. Darkvision 60ft. Resistance to poison, advantage on poison saves.
notes: Unassigned.

name: Goggles of Night
effect: Darkvision 60ft. If already have darkvision, extends by 60ft.
notes: Unassigned.

name: Gauntlets of Ogre Power
effect: Sets STR to 19.
notes: Unassigned. Corwin already has a pair.

name: Helm of Brilliance
effect: 6 opals cast Daylight. 9 rubies cast Fireball. 5 diamonds cast Wall of Light. Undead within 30ft have disadvantage on attacks. On 1 in sunlight: explodes.
notes: Unassigned.

name: Scroll of Ice Storm
effect: Cast Ice Storm at 4th level. Single use.

name: Scroll of Mind Whip
effect: Cast Mind Whip at 2nd level. Single use.

name: The Right Arm
appearance: Ancient wood of unknown origin, warm to touch. Living moss covers most of the surface. Small flowers bloom and die on their own schedule. Insects appear occasionally that have no business being wherever the bearer currently is.
notes: Tackett refers to it as his right arm. Offered by the Trevash delta spring after Tackett destroyed the ancient spirit corrupting it.
effect:
MELEE: +3 quarterstaff. Automatically deals the most harmful damage type to the target. Once per short rest on a hit: vines root the target until the end of their next turn.

SPELLCASTING FOCUS: Spell save DC +2. Once per long rest: cast any one spell without expending a spell slot.

WILDSHAPE: Staff merges into the druid's non-halfling forms. While merged: +3 to attack and damage rolls, HP maximum increases by druid level, once per wildshape cast one cantrip as a bonus action. In Circle of Stars form the staff remains physical.

name: Shadowgrain Leather
effect: Always +1 to AC. Additional +1 to AC while in dim light or darkness, for a total of +2.
notes: Commission from Torrin Gallowglass. Dark green-brown leather, forest floor coloring, grain patterns that shift with the light. Melds into wildshape forms per druid rules — AC bonus applies in halfling form only. Torrin's signature: made for someone who knows how to use shadow.

name: Helm of Carix
effect: Immunity to charm and fear. Once per day when wearer does something that genuinely surprises an enemy, gain advantage on next attack roll.
notes: Commission from Torven forge. Grey-green matching Full Plate +2. Carix's coin standing on edge worked into forehead in subtle relief. The metal was listening when it was made.

name: Helm of the Reaching Hand
effect: Advantage on Insight checks. Once per day as a reaction when an ally within 30ft makes a death saving throw, grant them advantage on it.
notes: Commission from Torven forge. Amber gold with storm-grey inlay. Veleth's two hands almost touching worked into temple pieces. The metal kept trying to become something it hasn't become yet — the smith let it.

name: Helm of the Open Eye
effect: Darkvision extended by 30ft. Advantage on saving throws against being blinded or deafened.
notes: Commission from Torven forge. Dark metal with green-gold veining matching Kerra's eyes. An open eye worked into the brow — no deity symbol, the metal didn't want one. It wanted a window.

name: Headband of Intellect
effect: Sets INT to 19.

name: Green Fey Armor
effect: Counts as half plate (AC 15 + DEX mod max 2). Appears revealing but magical protection extends invisibly for full coverage. +1 CHA while attuned. Only Enauweyn can attune to this item.
description: Green armor of fey construction. Revealing in appearance but the magical protection extends invisibly — coverage is complete. Luxurious flowing cloth around legs and sleeves gives a mystical quality. The green deepens or lightens subtly with her mood.
notes: Attunement restricted to Enauweyn only.

name: Ring of the Fallen Star
effect: Once per dawn: cast Starfall (see homebrew spells). Spell save DC uses wearer's spell save DC. Additionally, advantage on Perception checks made in darkness or starlight.
notes: Forged from meteorite iron by a civilization that no longer exists. Warm to the touch regardless of temperature. Constellation patterns visible in the metal only in darkness or starlight. Responds to celestial/star magic.

name: Yetgrese Throwing Sword +2
effect: Returns instantly to thrower's hand after a thrown attack, whether it hits or misses.
notes: Saltborn steel — no mechanical effect, flavor only.

name: Hlifar'dhe'gar
notes: Named by Jaygar. Two points of light function as eyes. Previous owner never named it. Ssivanak kept it three years waiting for right owner.
effect: +1 small shield (+1 AC). Command word 'viel'bi-ra' transforms it into a construct guardian (HP 142, AC 17) that stands between you and harm, intercepting damage directed at the attuned wearer. The construct cannot attack. Command word 'chk'TO' returns it to shield form. Also stores one spell up to 4th level.

name: Robe of the Tide
notes: Made from local Yetgrese materials. Iridescent fabric that shifts with movement. Not available in Aethermoor.
effect: When wearer casts a spell dealing cold, lightning, or thunder damage, add 2d6 of same damage type once per turn. Wearer can breathe underwater and has swimming speed equal to walking speed.

name: Robe of Stilled Thought
notes: Made by Ssivanak herself. Significant item — effectively frees concentration slot while one spell runs autonomously.
effect: One concentration spell cast while wearing this robe does not require concentration — it runs for its full duration or until dismissed. Only one spell benefits at a time. Casting a second concentration spell ends the first immediately.

name: Bracers of Spell Mastery
effect: +2 to spell save DC.
notes: Intended for Elucyne to enhance Fear and other save-based spells.

name: Scroll of Control Water
effect: Cast Control Water (level 4). Single use.
notes: Immediately relevant for ocean travel and combat.

name: Scroll of Lightning Bolt
effect: Cast Lightning Bolt (level 3). Single use.
notes: Included free by Ssivanak to close the deal.

name: Scroll of Greater Invisibility
effect: Cast Greater Invisibility (level 4). Single use.

name: Scroll of Plane Shift
effect: Cast Plane Shift (level 7). Single use.
notes: Given free by Ssivanak in exchange for Jaygar identifying it. Inscription was deliberately damaged by previous owner to obscure contents.

name: Scroll of Sending
effect: Cast Sending once. Deliver a 25 word message to any creature on the same plane. Target can reply.
notes: Received as part of Ssivanak's Stillwater reward.

name: Scroll of Counterspell
effect: Cast Counterspell once. Interrupt a creature casting a spell of 3rd level or lower automatically. Higher levels require ability check.
notes: Received as part of Ssivanak's Stillwater reward.

name: Brooch of Shielding
effect: Resistance to force damage. Immunity to Magic Missile.
notes: Given by Ssivanak as part of Stillwater reward, her choice of item.

name: Potion of Greater Healing
effect: Restores 4d4+4 HP. Bonus action to self-administer.

name: Potion of Greater Healing
effect: Restores 4d4+4 HP. Bonus action to self-administer.

name: Potion of Greater Healing
effect: Restores 4d4+4 HP. Bonus action to self-administer.

name: Potion of Greater Healing
effect: Restores 4d4+4 HP. Bonus action to self-administer.

name: Potion of Greater Healing (Measured Word formulation)
effect: Restores 4d4+4 HP with advantage on the roll. Bonus action to self-administer.

name: Potion of Greater Healing (Measured Word formulation)
effect: Restores 4d4+4 HP with advantage on the roll. Bonus action to self-administer.

name: Potion of Superior Healing
effect: Restores 8d4+8 HP. Bonus action to self-administer.

name: Potion of Superior Healing
effect: Restores 8d4+8 HP. Bonus action to self-administer.

name: Amulet of Restoration
effect: Healing Word can be cast twice per short rest, recovered automatically.
notes: Pale green oval stone on silver chain. Carved with unidentified script.

name: Lexica's Enchanted Instrument
description: A lyre-like instrument of unusual construction, typical of no known tradition on Kaemahz. Acquired from a travelling vendor at the Halfweek Festival. One of two such instruments held by the same vendor. Dark wood with unfamiliar inlays, the resonance fuller than the size suggests.
effect: While Bardic Inspiration is active on a creature, the wielder may use their reaction to cast Shield on that creature or on herself.
notes: Enchanted by DUVRAK, Upper Merchant Quarter, Argentveil.

name: Ring of the Knowing
description: Simple band of dark metal of unknown continental origin. Single flat face bearing a symbol worn almost to suggestion by time. Warm to the touch. Eleven years in Ossivane Relk's possession before purchase.
effect: Once per day the wearer may ask one specific, answerable question. The answer arrives in the wearer's own voice as though remembered rather than received. Answers are truthful. The ring occasionally volunteers additional relevant information beyond the question asked — treat this as significant. Questions must be specific: a location, a name, a fact. Abstract questions yield nothing.
notes: Purchased from Ossivane Relk, Linden Street Antiquities Market, Argentveil. Day 89, Year 468. Cost 12,000 gold. Origin unknown — metal not from Kaemahz. Pre-existing symbol unidentified. First use: located factor's man Davan (green coat) to Crestfall House, Seventeen Anchor Row. Ring volunteered 'he is not alone' unprompted. Second use pending.

name: Cold Valley Axe
effect: On attunement: wielder gains the Smite From Afar spell (homebrew, 1st-level Paladin).

name: Breastplate of Planes
effect: On attunement: advantage on concentration saving throws.

name: Shield
effect: +2 bonus to AC while carried.

name: Disc of Origin
notes: Oldest of the four. Heavier than the others, different stone. Angular markings read 'breath of the first wind.' Keys to the ruins arch northeast of Valdmere.
effect: When placed in a teleportation arch, keys the arch to the ruins northeast of Valdmere. Markings read 'breath of the first wind.' Oldest of the four discs.

name: Disc of the Unnamed Plane
notes: Middle weight. Markings identify a destination neither Lenn nor Ilwuoshim recognized. Old. Destination unknown.
effect: When placed in a teleportation arch, keys the arch to an unknown destination. Markings were not recognized by Lenn or Ilwuoshim. Destination is uncharted.

name: Disc of the Junction
notes: Lightest of the four. Markings identify a waypoint arch built between two others as a transit point. Destination functions as a hub rather than a final location.
effect: When placed in a teleportation arch, keys the arch to a waypoint hub built between two other arches — a transit point rather than a final destination.

name: Disc of Ilwuoshim's Second Arch
notes: Ilwuoshim's own making, identified by the djinn personally. Keys to an arch built before the Liliveth was finished and never used. Ilwuoshim wants to go there when free. Keep safe.
effect: When placed in a teleportation arch, keys to an arch built by Ilwuoshim before the Liliveth was completed — never previously used. Ilwuoshim wishes to visit when free.

name: Ring of Amity
effect: Once per long rest, attune to one willing creature within reach. Any healing you receive is also received by the bonded creature for the same amount. Once per day as a reaction (within 60 ft), turn any attack roll the bonded creature makes into a critical hit.

name: Longbow
effect: Standard longbow. 1d8 piercing. Range 150/600ft. Requires two hands.

name: Scroll of Tongues
effect: Cast Tongues (level 3). Single use. Target understands and is understood in any language for 1 hour.
